nasb.text: But the firstborn of an ox or the firstborn of a sheep or the firstborn of a goat, you shall not redeem; they are holy. You shall sprinkle their blood on the altar and shall offer up their fat in smoke as an offering by fire, for a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: But the firstborn of a cow, or the firstborn of a sheep, or the firstborn of a goat, you shall not redeem; they are holy. You shall sprinkle their blood on the altar and shall burn their fat as a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 只是頭生的牛、頭生的綿羊，或是頭生的山羊，你不可贖出來；牠們都是聖的。你要把牠們的血灑在祭壇上，把牠們的脂油焚燒，作為獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

ccb.text: 头生的牛、绵羊和山羊不用赎出来，它们都是圣物。你要把它们的血洒在祭坛上，把脂肪烧掉，作为献给耶和华的馨香火祭；
